title: 25 Hidden n8n Features That Save Hours of Work

extracted.hook: All right, here are 25 Naden hacks that I wish I knew when I started building with Naden last year.
transitions: All right, starting off with number one.
Okay, number two is the ability to pin data.
And then we're able to use all of this data over here to continuously map out the different variables for the rest of the workflow.
Okay, number four is the ability to move between nodes.
All right, number five is being able to deactivate nodes.
All right, number eight is just another quick keyboard shortcut.
And by the way, did you guys see how quick I activated all those nodes earlier?
Anyways, number 10 is current date and time.
extracted.cta: "if you enjoyed this one or you learned something new, leave a like. It definitely helps me out a ton."
analogies: "All right, starting off with number one. Hopefully, we all know the difference between a fixed value and an expression value."
extracted.vulnerability: "I don't want to go copy that API key every time I was setting up this HTTP request"

accelerate: discussing keyboard shortcuts and their benefits
slow: explaining the organization feature with sticky notes
